## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Promptfoo account status, strategize content improvement, and align on next steps to regain client trust.](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent article improvements have shown promise, but client feedback is pending](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Content strategy needs refinement: focus on LLM testing, cybersecurity, and AI-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Team to develop content clusters and expand keyword research to build a robust content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Immediate goal: Deliver 1-2 high-quality articles to showcase improved process and regain client confidence](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Previous articles were too long (20+ pages) and required extensive editing](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Recent revisions have significantly reduced editing time for the client](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [New SOP implemented for article generation, including research and product connection guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Latest article sent for review, awaiting client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### Content Pipeline and Keyword Research

  - [Current Airtable setup cleaned and reorganized for better workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Keyword opportunities identified, but need refinement and clustering](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Focus on LLM testing, cybersecurity, and emerging AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Plan to develop content clusters around key themes (e.g., prompt injection, jailbreaking)](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Client Communication and Trust

  - [Client (Vanessa) initially pleased with recent improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Concern about potential negative feedback on latest revisions](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Need to follow up and maintain consistent communication](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Marcel to reach out and help rebuild trust](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift focus to creating content for emerging topics in AI and LLM security](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Leverage existing courses and resources for content ideas (e.g., Coursera's prompt engineering course)](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Develop articles even for low-volume keywords, anticipating future growth in the AI/LLM space](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Clarified Airtable status categories and workflow stages](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Discussed potential for handling image creation and publishing in-house](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Identified need for a more robust backlog and content planning process](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to prepare 1-2 high-quality articles for client review before the next call](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Marcel to refine content strategy, develop assignments, and create content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Review and resolve all outstanding comments on existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Follow up with client for feedback on recently submitted articles](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Explore possibilities for handling image creation and publishing internally](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Engage Elvis (AI) in the article creation process to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ssysvNPiNW69djqsLaHhcY3UygUud4j8?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
